transcript_preview: 7.14. Klausies, lasi un atbildi. Balta Narcise. Sarkana Neļķe. Sarkana Roze. Dzeltana Tulpe. Labdien! Man lūdzu ziedus dāvanai. Labdien! Tie būs sievietai vai vīrietim? Sievietai dzimšanas dienā. Lūdzu, te ir sarkana roze Tā maksā divus eir
translation_preview: 7.14 Listen, read and answer. White Narcise. Red Neal. Red Rose. Zeltana Tulipe. Hello! I asked for flowers for a gift. Hello! They'll be a woman or a man? Place of birth. Here's a red rose. It costs two Euros A white carnation pays 95 cent
